mapper.select:
/* CanUserMgmtMapper.selectCanUserList */ SELECT USR_ID AS usrId ,USR_ID AS usrIdMsk ,USR_NM AS usrNm ,USG_STRT_DT AS usgStrtDt ,USG_END_DT AS usgEndDt ,REASON ,TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS regDt FROM CMN_USR_MST@DL_CAN WHERE (USG_STRT_DT >= #{searchEndDate} OR USG_END_DT >= #{searchStartDate})
AND USR_ID = UPPER(#{searchVal})
AND USR_NM LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
ORDER BY USG_END_DT DESC, USR_NM
mapper.insert: /* CanUserMgmtMapper.insertCanUser */ INSERT INTO CMN_USR_MST@DL_CAN ( USR_ID ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,USR_NM ,PASS ,TEL_NUM ,MBLPHN_NUM ,LAST_LOGIN_DT ,PASS_ERR_NUM ,PRES_BIZ ,EMAIL ,POS ,ODTY ,ADDR ,DTL_ADDR ,ZIPCD ,FAX ,PASS_ATMT_NUM ,DEL_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,DEPT ,IP_INFO ,MAC_ADDR ,USG_YN ,USG_STRT_DT ,USG_END_DT ,PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT ,MNGR_RULE ,MSK_AUTH_YN ,ORGN_ID ,OTP ,REASON ,ORGN_NM ) SELECT A.USR_ID ,A.ATTC_SCTN_CD ,A.USR_NM ,A.PASS ,A.TEL_NUM ,A.MBLPHN_NUM ,NULL /* LAST_LOGIN_DT */ ,0 /* PASS_ERR_NUM */ ,A.PRES_BIZ ,A.EMAIL ,A.POS ,A.ODTY ,A.ADDR ,A.DTL_ADDR ,A.ZIPCD ,A.FAX ,0 /* PASS_ATMT_NUM */ ,A.DEL_YN ,#{sessionUserId} /* REGST_ID */ ,SYSDATE /* REGST_DTTM */ ,#{sessionUserId} /* RVISN_ID */ ,SYSDATE /* RVISN_DTTM */ ,A.DEPT ,A.IP_INFO ,A.MAC_ADDR ,A.USG_YN ,#{usgStrtDt} /* USG_STRT_DT */ ,#{usgEndDt} /* USG_END_DT */ ,A.PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT ,A.MNGR_RULE ,A.MSK_AUTH_YN ,A.ORGN_ID ,NULL /* OTP */ ,#{reason} /* REASON */ ,(SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) /* ORGN_NM */ FROM CMN_USR_MST A WHERE A.USR_ID = UPPER(#{usrId})

SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SEQ_NUM)),0) + 1 AS seqNum FROM CMN_USR_HST@DL_CAN WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}
/* CanUserMgmtMapper.insertCanUserHst */ INSERT INTO CMN_USR_HST@DL_CAN ( USR_ID ,SEQ_NUM ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,USR_NM ,PASS ,TEL_NUM ,MBLPHN_NUM ,LAST_LOGIN_DT ,PASS_ERR_NUM ,PRES_BIZ ,EMAIL ,POS ,ODTY ,ADDR ,DTL_ADDR ,ZIPCD ,FAX ,PASS_ATMT_NUM ,DEL_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,DEPT ,IP_INFO ,MAC_ADDR ,USG_YN ,USG_STRT_DT ,USG_END_DT ,PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT ,MNGR_RULE ,MSK_AUTH_YN ,ORGN_ID ,REASON ,ORGN_NM ) SELECT USR_ID ,#{seqNum} ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,USR_NM ,PASS ,TEL_NUM ,MBLPHN_NUM ,LAST_LOGIN_DT ,PASS_ERR_NUM ,PRES_BIZ ,EMAIL ,POS ,ODTY ,ADDR ,DTL_ADDR ,ZIPCD ,FAX ,PASS_ATMT_NUM ,DEL_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,DEPT ,IP_INFO ,MAC_ADDR ,USG_YN ,USG_STRT_DT ,USG_END_DT ,PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT ,MNGR_RULE ,MSK_AUTH_YN ,ORGN_ID ,REASON ,ORGN_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST@DL_CAN WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}
